creator: pstef@freebsd.org
text:
I had discovered this bug independently of this bug report. When I analyzed the libedit code I came to conclusions a bit different from yours. See https://github.com/NetBSD/src/commit/344e92e9fe7bec6b506f255cb608fcb05d9f43ce

If that patch is good, which I believe it is, we're now waiting for it to trickle down to us.
